mapper.select: SELECT * FROM category WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category(store_id, name, sort, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{name}, #{sort}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE category SET name = #{name}, sort = #{sort}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE category SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
